name: Box Optimization
description: Maximizing volume or minimizing surface area of boxes with constraints
identification_signal: Box, container, open-top box, cutting squares from corners

strategy.step_1: Draw diagram and label variables (length, width, height)
strategy.step_5: Find critical points by taking derivative

front.text: A box with square base and open top must have volume 1000 cm³. Find dimensions that minimize material.

back.title: Box optimization
back.explanation: Minimize surface area with volume constraint

items.prompt_latex: Squares cut from corners to make open box

steps.title: Define variables
steps.why: Need clear variables for objective and constraint

steps.title: Objective
steps.instruction: Write formula for what to optimize
steps.why: Usually volume V = lwh or surface area SA = 2(lw + lh + wh)

problem_cards.task: Squares of side x cut from corners of 10×10 square. Find x for max volume.
